footnotes.text: The feast of Tabernacles lasted eight days. This appearance of Christ in the temple would then be on the fourth or fifth day.
They knew that Jesus had not been enrolled as a disciple of one of the great rabbis, and they could not imagine where else He could attain such knowledge as was manifest in His preaching.
One work: curing the sick man at the pool of Bethsaida.
You both know me: the Jews knew Christ as Jesus from Nazareth. His real character and mission they did not as yet know.
